name: cyber-skills
description: Opinionated skills, hooks, and workflows for AI agents
author: unional <homawong@gmail.com>

scripts.check:private-skills: pnpm build && node bin/cyber-skills.mjs skill validate-private --root ../..
scripts.repair:private-skills: pnpm build && node bin/cyber-skills.mjs skill repair-private --root ../..
scripts.render:awesome-list: pnpm build && node bin/cyber-skills.mjs awesome render
scripts.test:audit: pnpm build && node bin/cyber-skills.mjs audit validate --root ../..
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:audit
